why.headline: More than IT services — {highlight}.
why.body: In a market of generic promises, Foursys delivers with method, metrics and governance. Every engagement starts with the right diagnosis and ends with measurable impact — whether in lead time, operational cost or AI ROI.
why.presence_1: Operations in Brazil, USA and Portugal
why.presence_2: Projects in regulated and mission-critical sectors
why.presence_3: Governance with delivery and risk metrics

how_we_work.headline: How we work
how_we_work.sub: Squads, Projects, Staffing and AMS — choose the model that best fits your needs.
how_we_work.squads_body: Multidisciplinary teams integrated with your team, with governance and metrics. Continuous delivery with quality and 3.6% turnover.

how_we_work.allocation_body: Specialized professionals allocated to your team. Flexibility for specific short or medium-term demands.

fourlives.headline: FourLives — Technology that transforms lives
fourlives.body: For Foursys, technology is a means, not an end. FourLives is our social impact program connecting training, inclusion and sustainability — because choosing a technology partner also means choosing a purpose partner.
fourlives.capacity_body: Technology education programs for low-income communities, training professionals for the IT market.
fourlives.inclusion_body: Diversity and inclusion initiatives to expand opportunities for underrepresented groups in technology.
fourlives.sustainability_body: One tree planted per professional per year and carbon footprint reduction goals in operations.

items.q: How does the free diagnosis work?
items.a: The diagnosis is a 45-minute conversation with a Foursys specialist. We map your main challenges, understand the context and present an initial view of how we can help — with no commitment to hire.

items.q: What is the minimum project size to work with Foursys?
items.a: We serve projects starting from one squad (3–5 people) for at least 8 weeks. For critical system modernization, the recommended minimum is 12 weeks for the first wave.

items.q: How do you guarantee delivery quality?
items.a: Each engagement includes a quality playbook: code review, test coverage, security and delivery metrics. We use DORA metrics as a baseline and deliver monitoring dashboards.

items.q: Do you work remotely or on-site?
items.a: We operate in a hybrid model. Squads work primarily remotely but maintain physical presence at key clients for planning and review meetings. We have offices in São Paulo, Curitiba, Rio, Lisbon and Boca Raton.

items.q: What is the difference between Hybrid Squads and Staffing?
items.a: Hybrid Squads come with built-in governance: quality playbook, security, metrics and delivery rituals. Staffing is a specialized professional integrated into your team without the governance overhead — more flexible for specific demands.
